message:
So there I was, in the middle of a typical Saturday. The kids were in the kitchen whipping up a snack, and I was lounging on the couch, half-watching a movie. Suddenly, my smoke alarm decided to join the party. 🥴

In a panic, I jumped into our family group chat—"Smoke alarm is going off! Everyone, what do we do?" It was hilarious (and a little chaotic) to see the flurry of responses from my husband, my sister, and even my mom. "Check the stove!" "Is it burnt popcorn again?!" 😅

Turns out, it was just a bit of smoke from the toaster. But it reminded me how important it is to have a plan in place. We chatted about escape routes and tested our smoke alarms later, turning a little scare into a productive family bonding moment. 

Have you had any funny or eye-opening moments like that with your loved ones? This little refresher helped, too!
